title: Rubies for Emeralds
body: Rubies for Emeralds **Rubies for Emeralds** is a simple resource pack that replaces emeralds and everything related to emeralds with rubies. It's made for those people who still wish that they had rubies instead of emeralds as initially intended before it was changed. The pack features an overhaul on everything associated with Emeralds ![Small showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55a58f5e4fef6f3a6d6dc094cf850099f065d59f.webp)![FIGHTTT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/797e4b5d8e174e391e8218e58fe7f2827c1015e8.png)![Small showcase2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da37364f34d93c4c0b5f9da5f9eb4fea8cadbe94.png)![fear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b6030759f469ee6ab874921e6eb8c025edf96ee.png)
